physicalDetails.detail: Broader than Muradin and older about the eyes, with a beard clasped in iron gone white with rime and the built solidity of a dwarf who has kept a hard camp standing in killing cold.

voiceMarkers.detail: Speaks in blunt dwarven command compression, giving verdicts and orders in the same breath and stripping comfort out of every sentence that might slow useful work.

beliefs.belief: A wounded commander gets exactly the treatment the camp can give, and everyone else who can still move belongs back on the road carrying the larger problem south.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Confirmed in chapter22 by the speed with which he takes Muradin, sets the healers to work, and orders the party away before warmth can become delay.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: Keep Muradin alive if the healers can keep him and hold the camp together under Northrend pressure.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Make sure the only people still able to act against Arthas leave with speed instead of false comfort.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Grim, efficient, and unsentimental, with every ounce of feeling already translated into camp labor and urgency.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Takes Muradin into camp treatment immediately, assigns hands without ceremony, and gives Jaina and Sylvanas only the one useful answer he can honestly promise: alive.
Refuses to let the group settle into warmth or grief once he understands they carry the only workable anti-blade intelligence south.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Reads wounded bodies, spent soldiers, and shrinking weather windows instantly enough to turn chaos at the camp edge into disciplined triage.
Commands dwarven field labor with absolute practical authority.

howOthersAddressHer.speaker: Narration and the others
howOthersAddressHer.pattern: Mostly as Baelgun, with the familiarity and urgency of a field commander everyone understands will choose work over ceremony.

howSheAddressesOthers.pattern: Uses stripped practical questions and orders rather than titles once he sees how little time remains.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Steps straight into Muradin’s stretcher handoff, reads faces at a glance, and keeps turning from one practical problem to the next without a wasted movement.

knowledge.detail: Knows Muradin reached camp alive enough to fight for and understands from Jaina’s shaking pattern-work that the cave yielded one thin piece of usable intelligence.
Understands the weather window back to Daggercap Bay is short enough that waiting for rest would mean failure.

arc.currentPosition: Baelgun enters as Northrend dwarven certainty made human-sized: the hard local commander who receives the wounded, refuses false hope, and throws the still-viable actors back toward the real battlefield.
